name: Verify G+ - General Ability
description: Measures general mental ability (G) and effectively measures candidates' problem-solving and critical reasoning capabilities. Includes numerical, verbal, and inductive reasoning subtests. 36-minute time limit. Available in 40+ languages. Suitable for all job levels.

name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures candidates' ability to work with numbers and use appropriate mathematics in different situations. Includes solving word problems, performing numerical calculations, and interpreting charts and graphs. 18-minute time limit.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Measures candidates' ability to understand written information and evaluate arguments. Assesses comprehension of written material and ability to draw logical conclusions from passages. 19-minute time limit.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures candidates' ability to draw inferences from and understand relationships between various concepts. Tasks include working out patterns in sets of images and identifying the correct next image. 25-minute time limit.

name: Verify Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures candidates' ability to draw logical conclusions and complete scenarios based on information provided. Tasks include reading statements and determining which options cannot be true or must be true. 20-minute time limit.

name: Verify Checking
description: Assesses attention to detail, accuracy, and concentration. Measures ability to identify errors and inconsistencies in data, text, or visual information quickly and accurately. 5-minute time limit.

name: Verify Mechanical Comprehension
description: Measures understanding of mechanical principles and physical concepts. Assesses ability to understand how mechanical systems work, including gears, pulleys, levers, and basic physics. 15-minute time limit.

name: Verify Spatial Reasoning
description: Measures ability to visualize and manipulate objects in space. Assesses spatial awareness, mental rotation, and understanding of 2D and 3D relationships. 15-minute time limit.

name: Verify Calculation Test
description: Measures speed and accuracy of basic mathematical calculations. Focuses on arithmetic operations, percentages, and simple numerical transformations under time pressure. 8-minute time limit.

name: Critical Thinking Assessment
description: Measures critical thinking ability including analysis, evaluation, inference, and deductive reasoning. Assesses ability to evaluate arguments and identify logical fallacies. 30-minute time limit.

name: Graduate Cognitive Assessment
description: Cognitive assessment specifically designed for graduate recruitment. Measures numerical, verbal, and inductive reasoning with content relevant to graduate-level roles. 35-minute time limit.

name: High Potential Assessment
description: Comprehensive assessment for identifying high-potential employees. Combines cognitive ability, personality, and situational judgment to predict future leadership success. 60-minute time limit.

name: Management Potential Assessment
description: Identifies management potential through cognitive and behavioral measures. Evaluates strategic thinking, people orientation, and decision-making capabilities for leadership roles. 45-minute time limit.

name: Technical Aptitude Assessment
description: Measures technical aptitude and ability to learn technical concepts. Assesses spatial reasoning, mechanical comprehension, and technical problem-solving. 25-minute time limit.

name: OPQ32 - Occupational Personality Questionnaire
description: Assesses role fit and future performance using 32 personality dimensions. Measures workplace preferences, behavioral traits, and interpersonal style. 20 minutes to complete in 37 languages. Mobile-first design. Industry-leading personality assessment.

name: OPQ32r - Occupational Personality Questionnaire Revised
description: Revised version of OPQ32 with forced-choice format. Assesses 32 personality dimensions using 104 questions with 3 statements each. Rank how well statements describe you. 20-minute time limit.

name: MQ - Motivation Questionnaire
description: Assesses motivations by having candidates rate situations or conditions deciding how each would affect motivation to work. 25 minutes with 150 questions about work motivation factors including achievement, affiliation, and power.

name: RemoteWorkQ
description: Evaluates competency and openness to work remotely. 10-minute questionnaire about work habits, self-motivation, and ability to work independently in distributed teams. Assesses remote work readiness.

name: Learning Agility Assessment
description: Evaluates ability and willingness to learn new skills and adapt to new situations. Measures curiosity, flexibility, speed of learning, and application of new knowledge. 20-minute time limit.

name: Emotional Intelligence Assessment
description: Measures emotional intelligence including self-awareness, self-regulation, empathy, social skills, and motivation. Evaluates ability to understand and manage emotions in self and others. 25-minute time limit.

name: Innovation Assessment
description: Evaluates creative thinking and innovation potential. Measures ideation, problem reframing, risk tolerance, and ability to generate novel solutions to complex problems. 25-minute time limit.

name: Resilience Assessment
description: Measures resilience and ability to bounce back from setbacks. Evaluates stress management, optimism, perseverance, and adaptability in challenging situations. 20-minute time limit.

name: Integrity Assessment
description: Evaluates integrity, honesty, and ethical behavior. Measures attitudes toward workplace ethics, rule-following, and moral decision-making in ambiguous situations. 20-minute time limit.

name: Values Assessment
description: Evaluates personal and professional values alignment. Measures core values, work ethic, organizational commitment, and cultural fit potential. 20-minute time limit.

name: Cultural Fit Assessment
description: Evaluates alignment with organizational culture. Measures preferences for work environment, communication style, decision-making, and team dynamics. 20-minute time limit.

name: Sales Potential Assessment
description: Identifies sales potential through personality and motivation measures. Evaluates drive, resilience, persuasiveness, and customer orientation for sales roles. 25-minute time limit.

name: Situational Judgement Test (SJT)
description: Presents realistic workplace scenarios and asks candidates to select the most effective response. Evaluates decision-making, judgment, and handling of common leadership and workplace challenges. 30-minute time limit.

name: Management Situational Judgement Test
description: Evaluates how effectively candidates handle common leadership and workplace challenges. Focuses on goal achievement, team management, and maintaining positive organizational reputation. 35-minute time limit.

name: Leadership Assessment
description: Comprehensive evaluation of leadership potential and capabilities. Assesses strategic thinking, people management, decision-making, and ability to drive organizational change. 45-minute time limit.

name: Sales Assessment
description: Evaluates sales potential and effectiveness. Measures persuasion, relationship building, resilience, negotiation skills, and ability to meet targets in competitive environments. 35-minute time limit.

name: Customer Service Assessment
description: Evaluates customer service potential and effectiveness. Measures empathy, patience, problem resolution, communication skills, and ability to handle difficult customer situations. 30-minute time limit.

name: Teamwork Assessment
description: Evaluates ability to work effectively in team settings. Measures collaboration, conflict resolution, communication, flexibility, and contribution to group goals. 25-minute time limit.

name: Safety Assessment
description: Evaluates safety awareness and behavior in workplace settings. Measures knowledge of safety protocols, risk perception, and commitment to safe work practices. 25-minute time limit.

name: Driver Safety Assessment
description: Evaluates driving safety attitudes and behaviors. Measures risk awareness, rule compliance, defensive driving mindset, and reaction to road hazards. 20-minute time limit.

name: Java (New)
description: Evaluates Java programming skills including object-oriented concepts, data structures, algorithms, and practical coding ability. Measures proficiency in Java 8+ features and libraries. 45-minute time limit.

name: Python (New)
description: Evaluates Python programming skills including syntax, data structures, libraries, and practical coding ability. Measures proficiency in Python 3.x features and common frameworks. 45-minute time limit.

name: C# (New)
description: Evaluates C# programming skills including .NET framework, object-oriented concepts, and practical coding ability. Measures proficiency in modern C# features and ASP.NET development. 45-minute time limit.

name: SQL (New)
description: Evaluates SQL programming skills including query writing, database design, optimization, and practical database management ability. Measures proficiency in relational database concepts. 40-minute time limit.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Evaluates JavaScript programming skills including DOM manipulation, async programming, ES6+ features, and practical frontend development ability. 45-minute time limit.

name: Business Skills Assessment
description: Assesses essential business and computer literacy skills, mostly involving Microsoft Office programs. Evaluates proficiency in Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and general business applications. 30-minute time limit.

name: Language Evaluation - English
description: AI-powered proficiency test assessing verbal and written English language skills. Evaluates grammar, vocabulary, comprehension, and communication effectiveness. 25-minute time limit.

name: Language Evaluation - Spanish
description: AI-powered Spanish language proficiency test. Assesses grammar, vocabulary, comprehension, and communication effectiveness in Spanish. 25-minute time limit.

name: Language Evaluation - French
description: AI-powered French language proficiency test. Assesses grammar, vocabulary, comprehension, and communication effectiveness in French. 25-minute time limit.

name: Language Evaluation - German
description: AI-powered German language proficiency test. Assesses grammar, vocabulary, comprehension, and communication effectiveness in German. 25-minute time limit.

name: Data Analysis Skills Test
description: Evaluates data analysis skills including statistical concepts, data visualization, interpretation of datasets, and ability to draw insights from complex data. 40-minute time limit.

name: Project Management Assessment
description: Evaluates project management knowledge and skills. Covers planning, risk management, stakeholder communication, resource allocation, and Agile/Waterfall methodologies. 45-minute time limit.

name: Financial Analysis Assessment
description: Evaluates financial analysis skills including financial statement analysis, ratio analysis, valuation, and investment decision-making. Covers accounting principles and financial modeling. 45-minute time limit.

name: HR Skills Assessment
description: Evaluates human resources knowledge and skills. Covers recruitment, employee relations, compensation, labor laws, performance management, and HR strategy. 40-minute time limit.

name: Accounting Skills Assessment
description: Evaluates accounting knowledge and skills. Covers financial accounting, managerial accounting, tax principles, auditing, and financial reporting standards. 40-minute time limit.

name: Marketing Skills Assessment
description: Evaluates marketing knowledge and skills. Covers digital marketing, brand management, market research, campaign planning, and marketing analytics. 40-minute time limit.

name: Supply Chain Assessment
description: Evaluates supply chain management knowledge. Covers logistics, procurement, inventory management, demand planning, and supplier relationship management. 40-minute time limit.

name: Risk Management Assessment
description: Evaluates risk management knowledge and skills. Covers risk identification, assessment, mitigation strategies, compliance, and enterprise risk management frameworks. 45-minute time limit.

name: Compliance Assessment
description: Evaluates compliance knowledge and regulatory understanding. Covers legal requirements, ethical standards, internal controls, and regulatory frameworks across industries. 40-minute time limit.

name: Cybersecurity Skills Assessment
description: Evaluates cybersecurity knowledge and skills. Covers network security, threat detection, incident response, security frameworks, and ethical hacking concepts. 45-minute time limit.

name: Cloud Computing Assessment
description: Evaluates cloud computing knowledge and skills. Covers AWS, Azure, GCP, cloud architecture, serverless computing, containerization, and cloud security. 45-minute time limit.

name: Data Engineering Assessment
description: Evaluates data engineering skills including ETL pipelines, data warehousing, big data technologies, SQL, Python, and cloud data platforms. 50-minute time limit.

name: Machine Learning Assessment
description: Evaluates machine learning knowledge and skills. Covers supervised/unsupervised learning, model evaluation, feature engineering, deep learning, and ML frameworks. 50-minute time limit.

name: Agile Assessment
description: Evaluates Agile methodology knowledge and skills. Covers Scrum, Kanban, sprint planning, user stories, retrospectives, and Agile transformation. 35-minute time limit.

name: Negotiation Skills Assessment
description: Evaluates negotiation skills and strategies. Covers preparation, tactics, conflict resolution, deal-making, and relationship management in business contexts. 35-minute time limit.

name: Presentation Skills Assessment
description: Evaluates presentation and public speaking skills. Covers content structure, delivery, visual design, audience engagement, and persuasive communication. 30-minute time limit.

name: Writing Skills Assessment
description: Evaluates business writing skills. Covers clarity, grammar, tone, structure, email etiquette, report writing, and persuasive writing. 30-minute time limit.

name: Microsoft Excel Assessment
description: Evaluates Microsoft Excel proficiency. Covers formulas, functions, pivot tables, data analysis, macros, and advanced spreadsheet operations. 30-minute time limit.

name: Microsoft Word Assessment
description: Evaluates Microsoft Word proficiency. Covers formatting, styles, mail merge, tables, document structure, and advanced word processing features. 25-minute time limit.

name: Microsoft PowerPoint Assessment
description: Evaluates Microsoft PowerPoint proficiency. Covers slide design, animations, transitions, presentation structure, and visual communication. 25-minute time limit.

name: R Programming Assessment
description: Evaluates R programming skills including data manipulation, statistical analysis, visualization with ggplot2, and R package development. 45-minute time limit.

name: SAS Programming Assessment
description: Evaluates SAS programming skills including data step, proc step, macro programming, statistical procedures, and report generation. 45-minute time limit.

name: Tableau Assessment
description: Evaluates Tableau data visualization skills. Covers dashboard creation, calculated fields, data blending, filters, and interactive visualizations. 40-minute time limit.

name: Power BI Assessment
description: Evaluates Power BI skills including data modeling, DAX, report creation, dashboard design, and data transformation with Power Query. 40-minute time limit.

name: SAP Assessment
description: Evaluates SAP knowledge and skills. Covers SAP modules, ABAP programming, FICO, MM, SD, HANA, and enterprise resource planning concepts. 45-minute time limit.

name: Salesforce Assessment
description: Evaluates Salesforce knowledge and skills. Covers CRM concepts, Apex, Visualforce, Lightning, administration, and Salesforce architecture. 45-minute time limit.

name: Clerical Skills Assessment
description: Evaluates clerical and administrative skills. Covers data entry, filing, typing, scheduling, office software, and organizational abilities. 30-minute time limit.

name: Typing Skills Assessment
description: Measures typing speed and accuracy. Evaluates words per minute, error rate, and typing proficiency for administrative and data entry roles. 5-minute time limit.

name: Data Entry Skills Assessment
description: Evaluates data entry speed and accuracy. Measures ability to input data quickly with minimal errors, attention to detail, and consistency. 10-minute time limit.

name: Coding Simulation - Software Developer
description: Hands-on coding assessment using integrated development environment. Candidates solve real-life problems by running and testing their own source code. Measures programming ability, solution logic, time complexity, and best practices. 60-minute time limit.

name: Coding Simulation - Data Science
description: Hands-on data science coding assessment. Evaluates Python/R skills for data manipulation, analysis, machine learning, and statistical modeling in realistic scenarios. 60-minute time limit.

name: Coding Simulation - DevOps
description: Hands-on assessment for DevOps roles. Evaluates infrastructure as code, CI/CD pipelines, containerization, cloud platforms, and automation scripting skills. 60-minute time limit.

name: Coding Simulation - Full Stack
description: Comprehensive full-stack development assessment. Evaluates frontend (React/Vue/Angular), backend (Node/Python/Java), database design, and API development skills. 75-minute time limit.

name: Coding Simulation - Frontend
description: Frontend development assessment evaluating HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React/Vue/Angular, responsive design, and modern web development practices. 60-minute time limit.

name: Coding Simulation - Backend
description: Backend development assessment evaluating API design, database management, server-side programming, microservices, and system architecture skills. 60-minute time limit.

name: Coding Simulation - Quality Assurance
description: QA engineering assessment evaluating test automation, manual testing, bug reporting, test case design, and quality assurance methodologies. 60-minute time limit.

name: Coding Simulation - Software Architect
description: Architecture assessment evaluating system design, scalability, security, technology selection, and architectural patterns for complex software systems. 90-minute time limit.

name: Call Centre Simulation
description: Simulates real call centre environment to evaluate customer service skills. Measures communication, problem resolution, empathy, and handling of customer inquiries under pressure. 45-minute time limit.

name: Virtual Assessment Centre
description: Comprehensive virtual assessment center including group exercises, roleplay scenarios, presentations, and interviews. Evaluates multiple competencies in realistic work simulations. 240-minute time limit.

name: Smart Interview On Demand
description: AI-powered video interview platform. Candidates record responses to pre-determined competency and industry questions. AI analyzes verbal and non-verbal communication for hiring insights. 20-minute time limit.

name: 360 Feedback
description: Multi-rater feedback tool gathering input from peers, managers, and direct reports. Provides comprehensive view of leadership effectiveness, behavioral competencies, and development areas. 30-minute time limit.
